description: The analytics team requires a dimensional data warehouse built on top of the HR operational system. Staging tables (STG_EMPLOYEES, STG_DEPARTMENTS, STG_JOBS, STG_JOB_HISTORY) have already been loaded in the ANALYTICS schema (analytics/Analytics2024). Implement a star schema in the ANALYTICS schema consisting of a central fact table named FACT_EMPLOYEE_SNAPSHOT and at least three dimension tables, including the required DIM_DEPARTMENT and DIM_JOB, populated with transformed data from the STG_* staging tables. Create a view named RPT_DEPT_SALARY_SUMMARY that aggregates employee headcount, total salary, and average salary grouped by department name. HR credentials: hr/hr123; Analytics credentials: analytics/Analytics2024; System if needed: system/OraclePassword123.
